headline: MARKET WRAP — May 26
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — May 26, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Today's session crystallized a clear growth rotation as semiconductors and metals surged while traditional defensives faced selling pressure. The divergence between crypto fund outflows and miner strength highlighted positioning dynamics over fundamental shifts. Tomorrow's setup favors continued risk-on momentum if tech leadership sustains overnight. CLOSING PRICES SPY +1.1% | QQQ +2.2% | VIX +2.5% | TLT +1.0% | DXY -0.1% | OIL -3.1% vs MORNING SPY +0.5% | QQQ +1.6% | VIX +3.2% | TLT +0.1% | DXY flat | OIL +2.1% EVENING NEWS ▲ Blitz Wallet adds BTC Maps and Bitrefill integration for payments ▲ U.K. sanctions HTX over suspected ties to Russian crypto operations ▲ Fed's Kashkari: Middle East inflation risks could warrant series of rate hikes ▲ Euro: ECB hawks eye June rate hike – BNY ▼ NEW: Base launches Base MCP, allowing AI agents to connect to Base accounts, trade, swap, manage portfolios, and use onchain app plugins. https://t.co/YAzkFQriBT SCENARIO SHIFTS ↑ Late Cycle · ↓↓ Goldilocks · ↑ Stagflation · ↑ Hegemony · ↑ Displacement REGIME CHECK Risk Gauge: 72.1/100 (High). Phase: EXPANSION. SECTOR CLOSE Top sectors: SMH +6.0%, COPX +5.4%, URA +4.1%, XLP -1.2%, XLE -2.2%. Sector dispersion: 59 (HIGH, breadth BROAD_STRENGTH), 81% positive 1w.
